meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Design with AI to Scale Complex SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn how to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver enterprise-grade software with AI-assisted design and development.
content.answer_block: To break through the ceiling of basic app development, integrate AI-driven design workflows using Antigravity and Claude Code. By automating boilerplate and architecting complex systems via natural language, you slash development time by 70%, allowing you to focus on high-value logic and client-specific business requirements for premium project delivery.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your latest project, and you are staring at yet another CRUD interface that looks like a prototype from 2015. You are trapped in the 'basic app' cycle, where the complexity of modern architecture feels like a wall you cannot climb without sacrificing your margins or your sanity. The market doesn't care about your struggle; it demands high-fidelity, scalable, and responsive systems delivered yesterday.

But the paradigm has shifted. By marrying the structural precision of Antigravity with the reasoning depth of Claude Code, you move from manual coding to system orchestration. This is not just about writing code faster; it is about designing software at the speed of thought. It is time to stop being a code monkey and start acting as the lead architect your clients are paying for.

steps.title: Architecting the Data Schema
steps.description: Define your relational data model with high-level constraints to ensure long-term scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a scalable PostgreSQL schema for a multi-tenant SaaS platform including users, organizations, and subscription tiers. Use UUIDs for keys and implement Row Level Security policies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on the antigravity output and apply migrations'

steps.title: Component Design & UI System
steps.description: Generate a consistent design language that creates a premium feel without manual CSS wrangling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a Tailwind-based design system with a specific focus on a modern, dark-mode aesthetic. Generate a custom button and input component library using Shadcn patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply these component styles to the existing dashboard layout'

steps.title: Implementing API Endpoints
steps.description: Automate the creation of robust, type-safe API routes that handle complex business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Next.js API routes for a subscription management module using Stripe SDK, including webhooks for event handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement the webhook handler and integrate with the database schema from step 1'

steps.title: State Management Logic
steps.description: Ensure your frontend handles complex state transitions without spaghetti code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React state management pattern using TanStack Query for caching and server-side synchronization of user profiles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor existing state hooks to use TanStack Query as defined'

steps.title: Testing & QA Automation
steps.description: Deploy automated tests to guarantee your production environment is bulletproof.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Playwright E2E tests for the onboarding flow, checking for edge cases in form validation and authentication.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate test files and execute them to verify current build integrity'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'context.md' file in your root directory to keep Claude Code aligned with your project's specific architecture patterns.
Use Antigravity to generate 'system prompts' that you can reuse across different project files to maintain stylistic consistency.
Never accept the first AI output; ask for a 'refactor for performance' or 'security audit' iteration on every major module.
Treat your AI interactions as code reviews; require the model to explain the reasoning behind complex logic blocks before implementation.
Modularize your prompts by feature; feeding the AI a massive codebase at once leads to hallucination and logic drift.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project's technical debt using Claude Code, then use the Antigravity prompt library to standardize your next feature release.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to escape the cycle of basic development and start shipping enterprise-grade software. Stop struggling with syntax and start managing architecture. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
